# withUnsafeBytes(_:)

**Instance Method**

Calls the given closure with a pointer to the underlying bytes of the region’s contiguous storage.

## Declaration

```swift
func withUnsafeBytes<ResultType>(_ body: (UnsafeRawBufferPointer) throws -> ResultType) rethrows -> ResultType
```
